title: BLE transport: potential NULL dereference in connected_cb
notes: Fixed as part of MTU refactor in ble_ipsp_transport.c. The buggy bt_conn_get_info + data_len deref was completely replaced by safe bt_gatt_get_mtu(conn) calls (see connected_cb:128 and slip_send:538). No NULL deref possible. Fixed in commit e7443a373 (p0 batch). Code reviewed and builds clean.
close_reason: Resolved by MTU refactor using bt_gatt_get_mtu which eliminates the data_len dereference entirely. Code in lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/ble_ipsp_transport.c:128,538 is now correct and safe. Verified with grep and read. Commit e7443a373 included this as part of P0 fixes. No remaining issues.
